---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents:
    - _content/**/index.qmd
    - _content/**/linkedin.md
  exclude:
    filename: "paper.*"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  feed: true
  categories: numbered
page-layout: full
---

Short-form posts, commentary, and long-form articles on statistics, causal inference, A/B testing, and marketing measurement.
